title: Ubiquiti UNAS 4, White
description: UniFi Network Attached Storage with (4) 2.5/3.5" HDD bays , (2) M.2 NVMe SSD cache slots , 2.5 GbE RJ-45 networking, USB-C connectivity, and an included PoE+++ adapter, all in a compact footprint. Powered by a quad-core ARM Cortex-A55 processor, complemented by 4 GB of RAM Device 90W PoE+++ adapter
